features.name: parameterized virtual class extending uvm_object
features.description: Code should include a virtual class with a type parameter that defaults to another type, extending uvm_object

features.name: class extending parameterized class with default type
features.description: Code should include a class that extends a parameterized class using the class's own type parameter as the argument to the parent's type parameter

features.name: class extending parameterized class with explicit type matching default
features.description: Code should include a class extending a parameterized class where the explicit type argument matches the parent's default type parameter value

features.name: cast between parameterized class instances with matching type parameters
features.description: Code should include a $cast operation between a derived class instance and a base class variable where the type parameters should match
features.snippet:
cst = $cast(seq, obj);
if (!cst || seq == null) $error("%%Error: cast failed");
